intake.user_request: Sync all human- and agent-facing surfaces (docs, skills, CONTEXT.md) plus two runtime artifacts (RAG reindex, .mcp.json restore) to the shipped WO-REPO-REVIEW-2026-07-REMEDIATION-001 reality (close 4cd33af). classification.plan_type_rationale: Stub category=fix maps to strict; correctness drift across two repos (docs/skills/CONTEXT that now misrepresent shipped reality) plus two runtime artifacts (stale RAG vector index, missing .mcp.json). Strict gives full .coderef enrichment + per-phase hard stops so each surface is reviewed before the next.

constraints: LLM/embedding work is Ollama LOCAL-ONLY: no cloud API keys in this environment (operator directive 2026-07-02). Any reindex uses ollama (768-dim); doc/skill text must not present OpenAI/Anthropic as required defaults.
Commit on main by EXPLICIT path (main-only git model; never git add -A). CODEREF-CORE and ASSISTANT are separate repos — commit each by path in its own repo.
Do NOT bypass close-workorder hard gates (no --force; SKIP_COMMIT_CONTENT_CHECK forbidden).
This WO spans two repos (CODEREF-CORE + ASSISTANT). Doc/skill edits land in their respective repos; the WO artifacts + .mcp.json live in CODEREF-CORE.
